## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior/API)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / CI

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran, and any manual verification. -->

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` is clean
- [ ] Frontend (if touched): `npx tsc -b`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` are clean

## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
      and CLAUDE.md §6.
- [ ] I added or updated **offline** tests for my change where it makes sense.
- [ ] I did **not** remove a failing test just to make CI green.
- [ ] I updated the docs (README / CLAUDE.md / docstrings) where behavior changed.
- [ ] I added a line to the `[Unreleased]` section of [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md)
      for any user-facing change.
- [ ] I did **not** commit `data/`, `storage/`, `.env`, secrets, or `node_modules/`.
